content.problemStatement:
Convert a given infix expression to its equivalent postfix expression following operator precedence rules.


Operators allowed: +, -, *, /, ^, (, )
Operands can be single letters (a-z, A-Z) or single digits (0-9)
Follow standard operator precedence: ^ > *, / > +, -

Input Format

First line contains TTT - number of test cases
Next TTT lines each contain a string representing the infix expression


Output Format

For each test case, print a single line containing the equivalent postfix expression

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
Test Case 1: a+b*c

b*c is evaluated first due to operator precedence
Then add a to the result

Test Case 2: (a+b)*(c-d)

(a+b) is evaluated first due to parentheses = ab+
(c-d) is evaluated next = cd-
Finally multiply the results = ab+cd-*
